channel.title: BNN Bloomberg
channel.description: BNN Bloomberg is Canada's only television service devoted exclusively to business and finance news with wall-to-wall coverage of the markets.

item.description:
David Nelson, chief strategist at Belpointe Asset Management, joins BNN Bloomberg for his view on the stock market amid China's reopening. Nelson likes names the EV industry and is bullish on Albemarle Corporation. He also likes Health Care and advises investors to look at XLV.
Subscribe to BNN Bloomberg to watch more videos: https://www.youtube.com/BNNBloomberg
Connect with BNN Bloomberg: For the latest news visit: https://www.bnnbloomberg.ca For a full video offering visit BNN Bloomberg: https://www.bnnbloomberg.ca/video BNN Bloomberg on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/BNNBloomberg BNN Bloomberg on Twitter: https://twitter.com/bnnbloomberg BNN Bloomberg on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bnnbloomberg BNN Bloomberg on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/bnn-bloomberg -- BNN Bloomberg is Canada’s only TV service devoted exclusively to business, finance and the markets.
item.title: Reasons to buy the U.S. health care sector and EV industry
item.author: BNN Bloomberg
